text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Shrines are great! I feel cleansed from head
to toe!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It felt like my Bakushin had been lacking recently.
I haven't been in great shape either...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Much better! Right now, I feel like I could swiftly
deal with whatever is thrown my way!
...Uwaaa! What should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! How perfectly timed! A person-in-need! Allow
this class representative to assist you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh! If it isn't Biko! What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Bakushin O! I don't know what to do!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Heroes constantly need to devise new special
moves in their fight against evil...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
But I haven't the faintest idea! I tried asking the
gods for help, but my prayers have fallen on deaf
ears!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! Leave it to my keen intellect! I am a model
student and class rep after all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: To put it bluntly, all you need is Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It's all connected! If you Bakushin... You... um...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Your mind will get stimulated in different
ways!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Face the sun and... BAKUSHIN,
BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Oh! So it's like special training! Such intensity!
Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hurriedly chase after the two as they head
towards the direction of the sun.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, the sunset after a full power Bakushin...
Now, that's something special!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Ah! To Bakushin feels incredible! Not only do I
feel refreshed, but I learned a new special move
to boot!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Right! I could use that dash to slide into my heroic entrance!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! You like it? This is the way your class
representative does things! The power of
Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a content smile on her face, Sakura Bakushin
O seems to finally be back on her feet!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, no! There's no reason to falter over
something like this!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
...No, that's more than enough for a
demonstration! Your passion has been duly noted!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Give it your all and never give up! I'll do my best
to create a special move!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... I'm sorry I couldn't be more help...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O is still not back to her usual
self, and her prayers at the shrine seem to have
been of no help.
